title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at AstraZeneca India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at AstraZeneca India
jsonLd.description:
AstraZeneca India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About AstraZeneca India:
AstraZeneca India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
